COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Text Ruling

Prove-Up Hearing For Defendant Azat Hojadov
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Cindy Lee, Esq., for the Plaintiff Chung Lo Kwang.
Deborah Kwan sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendants Mikhail Altshuler and Azat Hojadov.
Defendant Arsen Gabuev not present in court. Defendant ordered to Room 622 for Settlement.
Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Exhibit 1. Copy of Lease Id/Evid.
Exhibit 2. Letter dated 4/13/13 to Mikhail Altshuler Id/Evid.
Exhibit 3. Three day cure Id/Evid.
Exhibit 4. Three day Notice to Quit Id/Evid.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Chung Lo Kwan and against defendants Mikhail Altshuler and Azat Hojadov as follows:
The Rental agreement is canceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Judgment applies to all occupants of the premises including tenants, subtenants if any, and named claimants if any (Code Civ. Proc. 715.010, 1169 and 1174.3) The money judgment applies only to Mikhail Altshuler.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 890 - 34th Avenue #8, San Francisco, CA 94121.

Holdover damages $2,427.92
Attorney's Fees $3,500.00
Costs $75.00
for a Total Judgment of $6,702.92
Judgment signed in open court.
Court ordered Exhibits returned to counsel for the care and custody of the court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2013 Continued To Jul-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Chubg Lo Kwan, is present. Represented by Debra Kwan.
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Azat Hojadov and Arsen Gabuev are present.
Attorney, Doan Nguyen, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Adrian Colley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept 502B. ,for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JULY 08, 2013 remains on calendar.
